examples.question: Why are customers churning?
examples.context: High churn rate in subscription business
examples.recommended_approach: CX journey mapping + CES + exit surveys + text analytics
examples.key_insights: Identify drop-off points in journey, measure effort at key touchpoints, analyze reasons

examples.question: Where do customers struggle most?
examples.recommended_approach: Customer Effort Score after support interactions + text analytics on tickets
examples.key_insights: CES pinpoints high-effort moments; text analytics reveals specific issues

examples.question: How can we improve onboarding?
examples.recommended_approach: CX journey mapping focusing on onboarding + CES + user testing
examples.key_insights: Map complete onboarding flow, identify friction points, measure effort
